steps.title: Place the parenthetical phrase
steps.content: The phrase "for instance" introduces an example inside the sentence. It should be set off with commas while keeping the opening phrase "In a JSON file storing data about fire belly newts" attached to the rest of the sentence.

steps.title: Reject broken punctuation
steps.content: A uses a colon where no list or explanation follows. B creates a fragment before the period. C uses a semicolon after a phrase that is not an independent clause. A comma correctly introduces the parenthetical transition. The answer is D.
